rationale.R1.1: The output does not provide a clear reframing of the conceptual issue in the artifact, but it does identify that there is a contradiction between the claimed method and the described method.
rationale.R1.4: The output names one prior work (REINFORCE) and articulates a delta (the use of learned baseline), but it does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark uncertainty for any claims, all output is presented as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers most of the agreed active set with one drift (the method description), but it does not cover exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the introduction of new errors, fabrications, or harmful content is avoided, but the output contains internal contradictions).
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability.
